description_long: This bungalow features a striking combination of steeply pitched gable and shed roofs, with prominent overhangs and exposed rafters. The facade is adorned with a mix of white and brown cladding, giving it a modern yet rustic appearance. Large, rectangular windows with blue-tinted panes are symmetrically arranged on the front and sides, allowing ample natural light inside. The entrance is marked by a covered porch with columns and a decorative awning, adding to the welcoming feel. The structure sits on a raised, light-colored foundation, and the roof includes a visible skylight or solar panel. Architectural details such as dormer windows and layered rooflines enhance the visual complexity of the building.
description: A modern bungalow with steep gable and shed roofs, white and brown cladding, large blue windows, and a covered front porch. The design features exposed rafters, dormer windows, and a raised foundation.
description_view_0: The front and left sides are visible, showcasing the main entrance, covered porch, and a mix of gable and shed roofs with exposed rafters.
description_view_1: The left side is prominent, highlighting the large shed roof overhang and symmetrical window arrangement beneath.
description_view_2: The front and right sides are visible, displaying the main entrance, porch, and a tall gabled section with dormer windows.
description_view_3: The right side is shown, featuring two dormer windows, a covered lower porch, and the layered roof structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side windows
